spacing-modifier.$description: Amount to multiply spacing variables by (independent density dial).

spacing-text-coupling.$description: How hard spacing follows body (md) font-size growth: 1 = 1:1, 0 = decoupled. Lets containers grow with text without a separate density bump.

line-height-modifier.$description: Amount to multiply line height variables by.

letter-spacing-modifier.$description: Amount to multiply letter spacing variables by.

fallback-font-size-modifier.$description: Fallback amount to multiply font size variables by in the event their specific modifier isn't set.

transition-duration-modifier.$description: Amount to multiply transition durations by (automatically set to 0 with media query match for 'prefers-reduced-motion'

min-interaction-size.$description: Minimum height and width for interactive elements like links or buttons. WCAG AA is >= 24px, AAA is 44px

tablet.$description: Small tablets and large phones in landscape (640px).

border.$description: Base disabled border color for outlines, strokes, and dividers.

border-subtle.$description: Subtle disabled border color for the least-prominent outlines and dividers.

border-muted.$description: Muted disabled border color for low-emphasis outlines and dividers.

border-emphasis.$description: Emphasis disabled border color for high-prominence outlines and dividers.

border-inverse.$description: Base inverse disabled border color for outlines and dividers on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-subtle.$description: Subtle inverse disabled border color for the least-prominent outlines on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-muted.$description: Muted inverse disabled border color for low-emphasis outlines on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-emphasis.$description: Emphasis inverse disabled border color for high-prominence outlines on inverse canvases.

canvas.$description: Base info canvas color for primary surfaces.

canvas-subtle.$description: Subtle info canvas color for the least-prominent, lightly tinted surfaces.

canvas-muted.$description: Muted info canvas color for low-emphasis, recessed surfaces.

canvas-emphasis.$description: Emphasis info canvas color for high-prominence surfaces.

canvas-inverse.$description: Base inverse info canvas color for surfaces on dark or inverted contexts.

canvas-inverse-subtle.$description: Subtle inverse info canvas color for the least-prominent surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-muted.$description: Muted inverse info canvas color for low-emphasis surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-emphasis.$description: Emphasis inverse info canvas color for high-prominence surfaces in inverse contexts.

ink.$description: Base info ink color for body text and icons on neutral or light canvases.

ink-subtle.$description: Subtle info ink color for the least-prominent, tertiary text and icons.

ink-muted.$description: Muted info ink color for secondary text and icons.

ink-emphasis.$description: Emphasis info ink color for high-prominence text and icons.

ink-inverse.$description: Base inverse info ink color for body text and icons on inverse or dark canvases.

ink-inverse-subtle.$description: Subtle inverse info ink color for the least-prominent text and icons on inverse canvases.

ink-inverse-muted.$description: Muted inverse info ink color for secondary text and icons on inverse canvases.

ink-inverse-emphasis.$description: Emphasis inverse info ink color for high-prominence text on inverse canvases.

border.$description: Base info border color for outlines, strokes, and dividers.

border-subtle.$description: Subtle info border color for the least-prominent outlines and dividers.

border-muted.$description: Muted info border color for low-emphasis outlines and dividers.

border-emphasis.$description: Emphasis info border color for high-prominence outlines and dividers.

border-inverse.$description: Base inverse info border color for outlines and dividers on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-subtle.$description: Subtle inverse info border color for the least-prominent outlines on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-muted.$description: Muted inverse info border color for low-emphasis outlines on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-emphasis.$description: Emphasis inverse info border color for high-prominence outlines on inverse canvases.

canvas.$description: Base positive canvas color for primary surfaces.

canvas-subtle.$description: Subtle positive canvas color for the least-prominent, lightly tinted surfaces.

canvas-muted.$description: Muted positive canvas color for low-emphasis, recessed surfaces.

canvas-emphasis.$description: Emphasis positive canvas color for high-prominence surfaces.

canvas-inverse.$description: Base inverse positive canvas color for surfaces on dark or inverted contexts.

canvas-inverse-subtle.$description: Subtle inverse positive canvas color for the least-prominent surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-muted.$description: Muted inverse positive canvas color for low-emphasis surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-emphasis.$description: Emphasis inverse positive canvas color for high-prominence surfaces in inverse contexts.

ink.$description: Base positive ink color for body text and icons on neutral or light canvases.

ink-subtle.$description: Subtle positive ink color for the least-prominent, tertiary text and icons.

ink-muted.$description: Muted positive ink color for secondary text and icons.

ink-emphasis.$description: Emphasis positive ink color for high-prominence text and icons.

ink-inverse.$description: Base inverse positive ink color for body text and icons on inverse or dark canvases.

ink-inverse-subtle.$description: Subtle inverse positive ink color for the least-prominent text and icons on inverse canvases.

ink-inverse-muted.$description: Muted inverse positive ink color for secondary text and icons on inverse canvases.

ink-inverse-emphasis.$description: Emphasis inverse positive ink color for high-prominence text on inverse canvases.

border.$description: Base positive border color for outlines, strokes, and dividers.

border-subtle.$description: Subtle positive border color for the least-prominent outlines and dividers.

border-muted.$description: Muted positive border color for low-emphasis outlines and dividers.

border-emphasis.$description: Emphasis positive border color for high-prominence outlines and dividers.

border-inverse.$description: Base inverse positive border color for outlines and dividers on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-subtle.$description: Subtle inverse positive border color for the least-prominent outlines on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-muted.$description: Muted inverse positive border color for low-emphasis outlines on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-emphasis.$description: Emphasis inverse positive border color for high-prominence outlines on inverse canvases.

mobile.$description: Size of a small mobile device.

mobile-lg.$description: Size of a larger mobile device.

tablet-lg.$description: Size of a larger tablet device.

desktop.$description: Size of a small desktop device.

desktop-lg.$description: Size of a larger desktop device.

widescreen.$description: Size of a large desktop device.

section.$description: Ideal max size of a page section.

section-margin-block.$description: Preferred vertical margin for page sections.

section-margin-inline.$description: Preferred horizontal margin for page sections.

aside.$description: Preferred size for an aside element.

neg-15.$description: Extremely large negative spacing (major overlap or pull effects).

duration-default.$description: Default duration used by utility transition classes with non-specialized timing functions (ease, linear, ease-in, etc

duration-slow.$description: Slower duration used by utility transition classes with non-specialized timing functions (ease, linear, ease-in, etc

duration-fast.$description: Faster duration used by utility transition classes with non-specialized timing functions (ease, linear, ease-in, etc

playful-motion-function-default.$description: Playful motion (spatial) default timing curve. Use for movement and layout-related transitions where a lively, expressive settle feels appropriate.

playful-motion-function-slow.$description: Playful motion (spatial) slow timing curve. Use for larger, more noticeable movement where you want a longer, expressive ease into the final position without feeling abrupt.

playful-motion-function-fast.$description: Playful motion (spatial) fast timing curve. Use for quick movement that still feels springy and characterful—snappy, but not rigid.

playful-motion-duration-default.$description: Playful motion (spatial) default duration. Pairs with the playful motion default curve for common movement transitions.

playful-motion-duration-slow.$description: Playful motion (spatial) slow duration. Pairs with the playful motion slow curve for larger or more prominent movement transitions.

playful-motion-duration-fast.$description: Playful motion (spatial) fast duration. Pairs with the playful motion fast curve for quick spatial transitions that should still feel expressive.

playful-fx-function-default.$description: Playful effects (non-spatial) default timing curve. Use for opacity, color, shadow, blur, and other visual effects where overshoot is not appropriate.

playful-fx-function-slow.$description: Playful effects (non-spatial) slow timing curve. Use for slower fades and effect changes that should feel smooth and deliberate without bounce.

playful-fx-function-fast.$description: Playful effects (non-spatial) fast timing curve. Use for quick effect transitions that should feel responsive but still smooth.

playful-fx-duration-default.$description: Playful effects (non-spatial) default duration. Pairs with the playful effects default curve for common fades and visual effect transitions.

playful-fx-duration-slow.$description: Playful effects (non-spatial) slow duration. Pairs with the playful effects slow curve for more noticeable fades or effect changes.

playful-fx-duration-fast.$description: Playful effects (non-spatial) fast duration. Pairs with the playful effects fast curve for subtle, quick visual updates.

calm-motion-function-default.$description: Calm motion (spatial) timing curve. Use for movement and layout-related transitions when you want a standard, stable feel with minimal flourish.

calm-motion-function-slow.$description: Calm motion (spatial) timing curve for slow movement. The curve is consistent across speeds; use the slow duration to make the transition feel more deliberate.

calm-motion-function-fast.$description: Calm motion (spatial) timing curve for fast movement. The curve is consistent across speeds; use the fast duration for snappier, standard motion.

calm-motion-duration-default.$description: Calm motion (spatial) default duration. Pairs with the calm motion curve for common movement transitions.

calm-motion-duration-slow.$description: Calm motion (spatial) slow duration. Pairs with the calm motion curve for larger or more prominent movement transitions that should feel steady and unhurried.

calm-motion-duration-fast.$description: Calm motion (spatial) fast duration. Pairs with the calm motion curve for quick, standard movement transitions.

calm-fx-function-default.$description: Calm effects (non-spatial) default timing curve. Use for opacity, color, shadow, blur, and other visual effects where overshoot is not appropriate.

calm-fx-function-slow.$description: Calm effects (non-spatial) slow timing curve. Use for slower fades and effect changes that should feel smooth and restrained.

calm-fx-function-fast.$description: Calm effects (non-spatial) fast timing curve. Use for quick effect transitions that should feel responsive without drawing attention.

calm-fx-duration-default.$description: Calm effects (non-spatial) default duration. Pairs with the calm effects default curve for common fades and visual effect transitions.

calm-fx-duration-slow.$description: Calm effects (non-spatial) slow duration. Pairs with the calm effects slow curve for more noticeable fades or effect changes.

calm-fx-duration-fast.$description: Calm effects (non-spatial) fast duration. Pairs with the calm effects fast curve for subtle, quick visual updates.

primary.$description: Primary font family for use in the system. Usually used for body content and interface items.

alt.$description: Alternate font family for use in the system. Primarily used for headings.

monospace.$description: Monospaced font family for use in the system. Primarily used for displaying code or for accessibility.

system-sans.$value: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji"
system-sans.$description: System sans-serif stack. Zero network cost; uses the platform UI font.

system-serif.$value: ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, "Times New Roman", Times, serif
system-serif.$description: System serif stack. Zero network cost.

system-mono.$value: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace
system-mono.$description: System monospace stack. Zero network cost.

interface.$description: Font family used for things like buttons or input fields.

heading.$description: Font family used for heading elements.

auto.$description: Auto z-index, lets browser determine stacking.

sticky.$description: Semantic z-index for sticky positioned elements.

fixed.$description: Semantic z-index for fixed positioned elements.

ink-active.$description: Label color when active or pressed.

ink-loading.$description: Label color while the button is in its loading state.

canvas-loading.$description: Background while the button is in its loading state.

border-color-active.$description: Border color when the button is active/pressed.

border-color-loading.$description: Border color while the button is in its loading state.

border-style.$description: Border style (solid, dashed, etc) for standard buttons.

font-size.$description: Base font size for button labels.

gap.$description: Gap between button icon and label.

group-gap.$description: Gap between buttons when rendered in a group.

min-height.$description: Minimum height to ensure tappable area.

icon-start-size.$description: Default icon size for icons at start of buttons.

icon-end-size.$description: Default icon size for icons at end of buttons.

box-shadow-focus.$description: Box shadow in focus state (in addition to outline).

transform-focus.$description: Transform effect in focus state (in addition to outline).

cursor.$description: Cursor style when hovering over buttons.

cursor-loading.$description: Cursor style while the button is in its loading state.

flex-direction.$description: Direction of icon and label layout.

justify-content.$description: Main axis alignment for button contents.

align-items.$description: Cross axis alignment for button contents.

transition-property.$value: background-color, color, border-color, box-shadow, transform, outline
transition-property.$description: CSS properties that should animate on interaction.

transition-delay.$description: Delay before CSS properties run through their animate on interaction.

opacity-loading.$description: Visual opacity while the button is in its loading state.

display.$description: Display mode for the <zbk-checkbox> host element.

canvas.$description: Background of an unchecked checkbox control.

canvas-indeterminate.$description: Control background in the indeterminate state.

border-color.$description: Border color of an unchecked checkbox control.

border-color-indeterminate.$description: Control border color in the indeterminate state.

border-width.$description: Border thickness of the checkbox control.

border-style.$description: Border style of the checkbox control.

border-radius.$description: Corner radius of the checkbox control.

indicator-color.$description: Color of the checkmark and indeterminate bar.

indicator-stroke-width.$description: Stroke width of the checkmark; also the indeterminate bar's thickness.

indicator-radius.$description: Corner radius of the indeterminate bar.

indicator-size.$description: Size of slotted indicator content (checked/unchecked/indeterminate slots); 1em tracks the component's font-size so size variants rescale it.

font-family.$description: Font family for the checkbox label.

font-size.$description: Font size for the checkbox label.

font-weight.$description: Font weight for the checkbox label.

line-height.$description: Line height for the checkbox label.

letter-spacing.$description: Letter spacing for the checkbox label.

gap.$description: Space between the control and its label.

align-items.$description: Cross-axis alignment of control and label.

group-direction.$description: Flow direction of a .zbk-checkbox-group (column or row).

box-shadow-focus.$description: Control shadow in the focus state (in addition to the outline).

cursor.$description: Cursor when hovering an enabled checkbox.

cursor-disabled.$description: Cursor when hovering a disabled checkbox.

transition-property.$value: background-color, border-color, box-shadow, transform, opacity, outline
transition-property.$description: CSS properties that animate on state changes.

display.$description: Display mode for the <zbk-input> host element.

canvas-active.$description: Field background while pressed (pointer down before focus).

canvas-invalid.$description: Field background when the value is invalid (after interaction).

ink-invalid.$description: Entered-text color when the value is invalid.

caret-color.$description: Color of the text insertion caret.

border-color.$description: Border color of the field box.

border-color-invalid.$description: Field border color when the value is invalid.

border-width.$description: Border thickness of the field box.

border-style.$description: Border style of the field box.

border-radius.$description: Corner radius of the field box.

font-family.$description: Font family for the entered text.

font-size.$description: Font size for the entered text.

font-weight.$description: Font weight for the entered text.

line-height.$description: Line height for the entered text.

letter-spacing.$description: Letter spacing for the entered text.

label-gap.$description: Space between the label and the field box.

affix-ink.$description: Color of prefix/suffix affix content (icon fonts and currentColor SVGs inherit it).

icon-size.$description: Size of slotted affix content (prefix/suffix slots); 1em tracks the field's font-size so size variants rescale it.

padding-inline.$description: Inline (horizontal) padding of the field box.

padding-block.$description: Block (vertical) padding of the field box.

gap.$description: Space between affixes and the entered text.

min-width.$description: Minimum width of the field box.

max-width.$description: Maximum width of the field box.

min-height.$description: Minimum field height to ensure a tappable area.

group-direction.$description: Flow direction of a .zbk-input-group (column or row).

box-shadow-focus.$description: Field shadow while focused (in addition to the outline).

box-shadow-invalid.$description: Field shadow when the value is invalid.

transition-property.$description: CSS properties that animate on state changes.

ink.$description: Label color of page, previous, and next items.

ink-disabled.$description: Label color of a disabled previous/next control.

ink-selected.$description: Label color of the current page item (aria-current).

canvas-disabled.$description: Background of a disabled previous/next control.

canvas-selected.$description: Background of the current page item (aria-current).

border-color-disabled.$description: Border color of a disabled previous/next control.

border-color-selected.$description: Border color of the current page item (aria-current).

font-size.$description: Base font size for pagination content.

display.$description: Display mode for the pagination nav.

min-width.$description: Minimum item width to keep the tap target.

min-height.$description: Minimum item height to keep the tap target.

icon-size.$description: Size of the previous/next glyphs (drawn or slotted).

ellipsis-ink.$description: Color of the non-interactive ellipsis separators.

status-ink.$description: Color of the compact-mode "Page X of Y" status text.

focus-color.$description: Outline color for a focused item.

focus-width.$description: Outline width for a focused item.

focus-offset.$description: Outline offset for a focused item.

transition-property.$description: CSS properties that animate on item interaction.

display.$description: Display mode for the <zbk-radio> host element.

canvas.$description: Background of an unselected radio control.

border-color.$description: Border color of an unselected radio control.

border-width.$description: Border thickness of the radio control.

border-style.$description: Border style of the radio control.

border-radius.$description: Corner radius of the radio control (a circle by default).

indicator-size.$description: Diameter of the selection dot and size of slotted indicator content; em-based so size variants rescale it through font-size.

indicator-radius.$description: Corner radius of the selection dot (a circle by default).

font-family.$description: Font family for the radio label.

font-size.$description: Font size for the radio label.

font-weight.$description: Font weight for the radio label.

line-height.$description: Line height for the radio label.

letter-spacing.$description: Letter spacing for the radio label.

gap.$description: Space between the control and its label.

align-items.$description: Cross-axis alignment of control and label.

group-direction.$description: Flow direction of a .zbk-radio-group (column or row).

box-shadow-focus.$description: Control shadow in the focus state (in addition to the outline).

cursor.$description: Cursor when hovering an enabled radio.

cursor-disabled.$description: Cursor when hovering a disabled radio.

transition-property.$value: background-color, border-color, box-shadow, transform, opacity, outline
transition-property.$description: CSS properties that animate on state changes.

display.$description: Display mode for the <zbk-select> host element.

canvas-invalid.$description: Field background when the selection is invalid (after interaction).

ink.$description: Color of the selected option's text.

ink-invalid.$description: Selected-option text color when the selection is invalid.

border-color.$description: Border color of the field box.

border-color-invalid.$description: Field border color when the selection is invalid.

border-width.$description: Border thickness of the field box.

border-style.$description: Border style of the field box.

border-radius.$description: Corner radius of the field box.

font-family.$description: Font family for the selected option's text.

font-size.$description: Font size for the selected option's text.

font-weight.$description: Font weight for the selected option's text.

line-height.$description: Line height for the selected option's text.

letter-spacing.$description: Letter spacing for the selected option's text.

label-gap.$description: Space between the label and the field box.

affix-ink.$description: Color of prefix/suffix affix content (icon fonts and currentColor SVGs inherit it).

icon-size.$description: Size of slotted affix content (prefix/suffix slots); 1em tracks the field's font-size so size variants rescale it.

indicator-color.$description: Color of the drawn chevron indicator.

indicator-size.$description: Side length of the drawn chevron; 0.5em tracks the field's font-size.

indicator-stroke-width.$description: Stroke width of the drawn chevron.

padding-inline.$description: Inline (horizontal) padding of the field box.

padding-block.$description: Block (vertical) padding of the field box.

gap.$description: Space between affixes, the select, and the indicator.

min-width.$description: Minimum width of the field box.

max-width.$description: Maximum width of the field box.

min-height.$description: Minimum field height to ensure a tappable area.

group-direction.$description: Flow direction of a .zbk-select-group (column or row).

box-shadow-focus.$description: Field shadow while focused (in addition to the outline).

box-shadow-invalid.$description: Field shadow when the selection is invalid.

transition-property.$description: CSS properties that animate on state changes.

display.$description: Display mode for the <zbk-textarea> host element.

canvas-active.$description: Field background while pressed (pointer down before focus).

canvas-invalid.$description: Field background when the value is invalid (after interaction).

ink-invalid.$description: Entered-text color when the value is invalid.

caret-color.$description: Color of the text insertion caret.

border-color.$description: Border color of the field box.

border-color-invalid.$description: Field border color when the value is invalid.

border-width.$description: Border thickness of the field box.

border-style.$description: Border style of the field box.

border-radius.$description: Corner radius of the field box.

font-family.$description: Font family for the entered text.

font-size.$description: Font size for the entered text.

font-weight.$description: Font weight for the entered text.

field-line-height.$description: Line height of the entered multi-line text.

letter-spacing.$description: Letter spacing for the entered text.

label-gap.$description: Space between the label and the field box.

padding-inline.$description: Inline (horizontal) padding of the field box.

padding-block.$description: Block (vertical) padding of the field box.

resize.$description: CSS resize behavior of the field (vertical, horizontal, both, none).

min-width.$description: Minimum width of the field box.

max-width.$description: Maximum width of the field box.

min-block-size.$description: Minimum field height for a multi-line box; also a tappable floor.

box-shadow-focus.$description: Field shadow while focused (in addition to the outline).

box-shadow-invalid.$description: Field shadow when the value is invalid.

transition-property.$description: CSS properties that animate on state changes.

display.$description: Display mode for the <zbk-toggle> host element.

track-height.$description: Height of the toggle track; the thumb and pill radius derive from it.

canvas.$description: Track background when the toggle is off.

canvas-checked.$description: Track background when the toggle is on.

border-color.$description: Track border color when the toggle is off.

border-color-checked.$description: Track border color when the toggle is on.

border-width.$description: Border thickness of the toggle track.

border-style.$description: Border style of the toggle track.

border-radius.$description: Corner radius of the track (track-height yields a pill).

box-shadow-checked.$description: Track shadow when the toggle is on.

box-shadow-focus.$description: Track shadow in the focus state (in addition to the outline).

thumb-inset.$description: Thumb offset from the track's start edge; negative overlaps the border.

thumb-canvas.$description: Thumb background when the toggle is off.

thumb-canvas-checked.$description: Thumb background when the toggle is on.

thumb-border-color.$description: Thumb border color when the toggle is off.

thumb-border-color-checked.$description: Thumb border color when the toggle is on.

thumb-radius.$description: Corner radius of the thumb (a circle by default).

thumb-shadow-checked.$description: Thumb shadow when the toggle is on.

thumb-transform.$description: Default thumb transform (travel is handled structurally).

thumb-transform-hover.$description: Thumb transform when hovered (e.g. a translateY lift).

thumb-transform-active.$description: Thumb transform while pressed (e.g. a press-down).

thumb-transform-checked.$description: Thumb transform when the toggle is on.

font-family.$description: Font family for the toggle label.

font-size.$description: Font size for the toggle label.

font-weight.$description: Font weight for the toggle label.

line-height.$description: Line height for the toggle label.

letter-spacing.$description: Letter spacing for the toggle label.

gap.$description: Space between the track and its label.

align-items.$description: Cross-axis alignment of track and label.

group-direction.$description: Flow direction of a .zbk-toggle-group (column or row).

cursor.$description: Cursor when hovering an enabled toggle.

cursor-disabled.$description: Cursor when hovering a disabled toggle.

transition-duration.$description: Duration for toggle state transitions, including thumb travel.

transition-property.$value: background-color, border-color, box-shadow, transform, opacity, outline
transition-property.$description: CSS properties that animate on track state changes.

opacity-disabled.$description: Track and thumb opacity when disabled.

display.$description: Display mode for the tooltip host element wrapping the trigger.

max-width.$description: Maximum bubble width before text wraps.

arrow-size.$description: Arrow square size; also sets the default trigger-to-bubble gap.

offset.$description: Gap between the trigger and the bubble.

z-index.$description: Stacking order when the top-layer popover API is unavailable.

show-delay.$description: Delay before a hint tooltip shows on hover/focus. Read by the element at runtime.

hide-grace.$description: Grace period before hiding, so the pointer can travel onto the bubble (WCAG 1.4.13 hoverable). Read by the element at runtime.
